member.name: T:FSBS.Cdk.Lambdas.PostConfirmationFunction
member.summary: Creates AppUser record, assigns org_id/app_role, marks invitation Claimed, and places staff users in the correct Cognito group.

member.name: T:FSBS.Cdk.Lambdas.PreSignUpFunction
member.summary: Validates the SHA-256 invitation token hash before allowing Customer Pool sign-up. Rejects any registration without a valid Pending invitation.

member.name: T:FSBS.Cdk.Lambdas.TokenRefreshFunction
member.summary: Re-syncs Cognito group membership from Entra ID groups (Staff Pool only). Calls AdminUserGlobalSignOut when the Entra account is disabled.
